manufacturer_name: Generic Gypsum Board Enclosure (USG / NGC / equivalent)

fire_rating.ul_design: UL X508 (or equivalent column enclosure assembly)

components.name: HSS Column (Hollow Structural Section)
components.material: ASTM A500 Grade B/C Structural Steel
components.description: Hollow structural section column — square or rectangular tube profile

components.name: Metal Stud Framing
components.description: Light gauge metal stud framing forming the boxed enclosure around the HSS column. Studs create an air gap between column face and gypsum board.

properties.air_gap_note: Min 1 in. air space between column face and back of gypsum board
properties.track_attachment: Floor and ceiling track fastened to structure

components.name: Gypsum Board Layers
components.material: Type X Gypsum Board — ASTM C1396
components.description: Multiple layers of 5/8 in. Type X gypsum board forming the fire-rated enclosure. Number of layers per UL listing.

properties.fastener_pattern: 1 in. Type S screws at 12 in. o.c. (base layer), 1-5/8 in. Type S screws at 12 in. o.c. (face layer)
properties.joint_stagger: Joints staggered between layers min 12 in.

components.name: Joint Compound
components.description: Joint compound applied at all gypsum board joints and screw heads

properties.application: All joints taped and finished, all screw heads covered
properties.tape_type: Paper joint tape or fiberglass mesh tape per listing

components.name: Corner Bead
components.material: Galvanized steel corner bead or vinyl corner bead
components.description: Corner bead installed at all outside corners of the gypsum board enclosure for edge protection and clean finish

properties.attachment: Screws or clinch-on, per gypsum board manufacturer

assembly_constraints.description: Maintain minimum air space between HSS column face and gypsum board
assembly_constraints.rule: Min 1 in. clear air space per UL listing. No insulation in cavity unless specified by listing.

assembly_constraints.description: Gypsum board joints must be staggered between layers
assembly_constraints.rule: Min 12 in. offset between base layer and face layer joints

assembly_constraints.description: Track must be continuous at top and bottom of enclosure and sealed to floor/ceiling assembly
assembly_constraints.rule: No gaps at track-to-structure interface. Fire caulk at gaps exceeding 1/4 in.

assembly_constraints.description: Enclosure height limited by stud structural capacity
assembly_constraints.rule: Max enclosure height per stud size/gauge deflection tables. Brace or increase gauge for heights exceeding limits.
